features.name: cleric-spellcasting
features.safe_summary: Prepare spells from the full Cleric list each day using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability.
features.rules_summary: Prepare spells from the full Cleric list each day using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability.

features.name: cleric-divine-order
features.safe_summary: Choose Protector (Heavy Armor and Martial weapon proficiency) or Thaumaturge (extra cantrip and Wisdom bonus to Arcana and Religion).
features.rules_summary: Choose Protector (Heavy Armor and Martial weapon proficiency) or Thaumaturge (extra cantrip and Wisdom bonus to Arcana and Religion).

features.name: cleric-channel-divinity-1-use
features.recovery: Regain all expended uses on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: cleric-channel-divinity-1-use
grants_actions.summary: Channel divine power to fuel Divine Spark, Turn Undead, and your domain's Channel Divinity options.

features.safe_summary: Channel divine power to fuel Divine Spark, Turn Undead, and your domain's Channel Divinity options.
features.rules_summary: Channel divine power to fuel Divine Spark, Turn Undead, and your domain's Channel Divinity options.

features.name: cleric-divine-spark
features.recovery: Channel Divinity refreshes on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: cleric-divine-spark
grants_actions.summary: As a Magic action, spend a Channel Divinity use to roll 1d8 + Wisdom modifier and restore HP or deal Necrotic damage to one creature within 30 feet.

features.safe_summary: As a Magic action, spend a Channel Divinity use to roll 1d8 + Wisdom modifier and restore HP or deal Necrotic damage to one creature within 30 feet.
features.rules_summary: As a Magic action, spend a Channel Divinity use to roll 1d8 + Wisdom modifier and restore HP or deal Necrotic damage to one creature within 30 feet.

features.name: cleric-turn-undead
features.recovery: Channel Divinity refreshes on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: cleric-turn-undead
grants_actions.summary: As a Magic action, spend a Channel Divinity use to force every Undead within 30 feet to make a Wisdom save or be Turned for 1 minute.

features.safe_summary: As a Magic action, spend a Channel Divinity use to force every Undead within 30 feet to make a Wisdom save or be Turned for 1 minute.
features.rules_summary: As a Magic action, spend a Channel Divinity use to force every Undead within 30 feet to make a Wisdom save or be Turned for 1 minute.

features.name: cleric-smite-undead
features.safe_summary: When you use Turn Undead, Undead with a CR at or below half your proficiency bonus are instantly destroyed if they fail the save.
features.rules_summary: When you use Turn Undead, Undead with a CR at or below half your proficiency bonus are instantly destroyed if they fail the save.

features.name: cleric-divine-domain-subclass
features.safe_summary: Choose your Divine Domain at level 3, gaining domain spells always prepared plus unique Channel Divinity options and features at levels 3, 6, 17.
features.rules_summary: Choose your Divine Domain at level 3, gaining domain spells always prepared plus unique Channel Divinity options and features at levels 3, 6, 17.

features.name: cleric-blessed-strikes
features.safe_summary: Choose Potent Spellcasting (add Wisdom modifier to Cleric cantrip damage once per turn) or a domain-granted weapon damage rider.
features.rules_summary: Choose Potent Spellcasting (add Wisdom modifier to Cleric cantrip damage once per turn) or a domain-granted weapon damage rider.

features.name: cleric-divine-intervention
features.recovery: Once per Long Rest if the intervention occurs. No restriction if it fails.

grants_actions.name: cleric-divine-intervention
grants_actions.summary: As a Magic action, implore your deity for aid and roll a d20 — on 11 or higher, your god intervenes. Once per Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: As a Magic action, implore your deity for aid and roll a d20 — on 11 or higher, your god intervenes. Once per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: As a Magic action, implore your deity for aid and roll a d20 — on 11 or higher, your god intervenes. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: cleric-greater-divine-intervention
features.safe_summary: Divine Intervention automatically succeeds. You can cast Holy Aura or Wish without a spell slot as part of the effect. Once per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Divine Intervention automatically succeeds. You can cast Holy Aura or Wish without a spell slot as part of the effect. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-2
features.safe_summary: Unlock 2nd-level spell slots, expanding your prepared list into stronger healing, control, and offensive options.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 2nd-level spell slots, expanding your prepared list into stronger healing, control, and offensive options.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-3
features.safe_summary: Unlock 3rd-level spell slots — a significant jump in available spell power and battlefield control options.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 3rd-level spell slots — a significant jump in available spell power and battlefield control options.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-4
features.safe_summary: Unlock 4th-level spell slots and expand access to stronger domain expressions and defensive options.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 4th-level spell slots and expand access to stronger domain expressions and defensive options.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-5
features.safe_summary: Unlock 5th-level spell slots — the tier where cleric spellcasting reaches its most powerful general-purpose options.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 5th-level spell slots — the tier where cleric spellcasting reaches its most powerful general-purpose options.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-6
features.safe_summary: Unlock 6th-level spell slots, extending into rare divine magic with powerful control and recovery effects.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 6th-level spell slots, extending into rare divine magic with powerful control and recovery effects.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-7
features.safe_summary: Unlock 7th-level spell slots and access to some of the most powerful divine magic available.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 7th-level spell slots and access to some of the most powerful divine magic available.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-8
features.safe_summary: Unlock 8th-level spell slots and a near-pinnacle tier of divine power.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 8th-level spell slots and a near-pinnacle tier of divine power.

features.name: cleric-spell-level-9
features.safe_summary: Unlock 9th-level spell slots — the highest tier of spellcasting, available to very few beings in the world.
features.rules_summary: Unlock 9th-level spell slots — the highest tier of spellcasting, available to very few beings in the world.

features.name: cleric-channel-divinity-2-uses
features.recovery: Regain all expended uses on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: cleric-channel-divinity-2-uses
grants_actions.summary: Channel Divinity now refreshes to 2 uses per rest, giving you significantly more resource flexibility.

features.safe_summary: Channel Divinity now refreshes to 2 uses per rest, giving you significantly more resource flexibility.
features.rules_summary: Channel Divinity now refreshes to 2 uses per rest, giving you significantly more resource flexibility.

features.name: cleric-channel-divinity-3-uses
features.recovery: Regain all expended uses on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: cleric-channel-divinity-3-uses
grants_actions.summary: Channel Divinity now provides 3 uses per rest — enough to be a consistent tactical tool across every fight.

features.safe_summary: Channel Divinity now provides 3 uses per rest — enough to be a consistent tactical tool across every fight.
features.rules_summary: Channel Divinity now provides 3 uses per rest — enough to be a consistent tactical tool across every fight.

features.name: cleric-cantrips-known-4
features.safe_summary: You now know 4 cleric cantrips, giving you a broader zero-slot toolkit.
features.rules_summary: You now know 4 cleric cantrips, giving you a broader zero-slot toolkit.

features.name: cleric-cantrips-known-5
features.safe_summary: You now know 5 cleric cantrips — a full set covering offense, utility, and defense.
features.rules_summary: You now know 5 cleric cantrips — a full set covering offense, utility, and defense.

features.name: cleric-ability-score-improvement-4
features.safe_summary: Improve two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat to add a specialized capability.
features.rules_summary: Improve two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat to add a specialized capability.

features.name: cleric-ability-score-improvement-8
features.safe_summary: Second ASI or feat — continue improving Wisdom or Constitution, or add a feat that suits your domain identity.
features.rules_summary: Second ASI or feat — continue improving Wisdom or Constitution, or add a feat that suits your domain identity.

features.name: cleric-ability-score-improvement-12
features.safe_summary: Third ASI or feat — shore up weaknesses or maximize your most impactful stat.
features.rules_summary: Third ASI or feat — shore up weaknesses or maximize your most impactful stat.

features.name: cleric-ability-score-improvement-16
features.safe_summary: Fourth ASI or feat — high-level refinement of your cleric build.
features.rules_summary: Fourth ASI or feat — high-level refinement of your cleric build.

features.name: cleric-subclass-feature-6
features.safe_summary: Your Divine Domain unlocks a second defining feature, deepening the domain's mechanical and thematic identity.
features.rules_summary: Your Divine Domain unlocks a second defining feature, deepening the domain's mechanical and thematic identity.

features.name: cleric-subclass-feature-8
features.safe_summary: Your Divine Domain grants a passive or active feature that reinforces its offense, defense, or support identity.
features.rules_summary: Your Divine Domain grants a passive or active feature that reinforces its offense, defense, or support identity.

features.name: cleric-subclass-feature-14
features.safe_summary: Your domain grants its level 14 feature, and your Blessed Strikes bonus now applies twice per turn instead of once.
features.rules_summary: Your domain grants its level 14 feature, and your Blessed Strikes bonus now applies twice per turn instead of once.

features.name: cleric-subclass-feature-17
features.safe_summary: Your Divine Domain unlocks its capstone feature, completing the domain's full mechanical identity.
features.rules_summary: Your Divine Domain unlocks its capstone feature, completing the domain's full mechanical identity.

features.name: cleric-epic-boon
features.safe_summary: Choose an Epic Boon feat — a rare, powerful enhancement available only to characters at this level.
features.rules_summary: Choose an Epic Boon feat — a rare, powerful enhancement available only to characters at this level.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.safe_summary: Spellcasting is tracked as a Cleric feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content

features.safe_summary: Divine Order is tracked as a Cleric feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content

features.safe_summary: Destroy Undead is tracked as a Cleric feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
